# Release notes template

Use this template when preparing a new release. Copy it into the GitHub
Release body (or a draft PR description) and fill in the sections.

---

## RuJa vX.Y.Z

### Highlights

<!-- 1-3 sentences summarizing what's notable in this release. -->

### Breaking changes

<!-- List any breaking changes, or write "None". -->

### Added

<!-- New features, syntax, or stdlib methods. -->

### Fixed

<!-- Bug fixes and spec-conformance improvements. -->

### Changed

<!-- Refactors, performance, or behavior changes. -->

### Internal

<!-- GC, compiler, or test-suite changes not visible to users. -->

### Contributors

<!-- Thank first-time contributors. -->
